schema_contract_for_ingest.chunk_hash_format: sha256 hex (64 lowercase hex chars), enforced by CHECK regex ^[0-9a-f]{64}$
schema_contract_for_ingest.rls_state: ENABLED + FORCED — only service_role can write/read directly via BYPASSRLS
schema_contract_for_ingest.acl_state: REVOKE ALL on table+sequence+RPC from PUBLIC, anon, authenticated. service_role retains BYPASSRLS implicitly.
schema_contract_for_ingest.rpc_security: SECURITY DEFINER, SET search_path = public, pg_catalog, STABLE, plpgsql
schema_contract_for_ingest.ingest_path_recommended: Use SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (already copied to Uniton_Shared/.env.local during LANE01-INFRA-AUTOMATION-V1) and `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (chunk_hash) DO NOTHING` via supabase-js or Mgmt API

blockers_for_clac1: NONE. DB schema is LIVE, RPC is SECURITY DEFINER (callable from service_role), env vars already synced via LANE01-INFRA-AUTOMATION-V1.
remaining_tech_debt_observed_during_phas: TD1: PowerShell pipe redirect (>) adds UTF-8 BOM that triggers Postgres 08P01 — workaround used: write to disk via Node fs.writeFileSync. Document in env policy if not already.

TD2: schema_migrations register helper splitter has minor false-splits on `;` inside comments — functionally fine because dollar-quoted strings concatenate back to the original source text, but a future cleanup could harden it.
